prompt: A dramatic Japanese movie poster collage in a glossy sentimental coming-of-age style, designed like an official theatrical key visual. The composition centers on a large close-up portrait of a young Japanese woman with shoulder-length softly wavy brown hair, natural makeup, and a white blouse, lit by warm golden sunset light and rim light around the hair. Surround the central portrait with a dense montage of 9 supporting visual elements: 1) top left, the heroine as a high school student in a dark school uniform with a ribbon tie, seen in profile against a glowing sunset sky; 2) mid left, a smaller school-uniform portrait of the heroine; 3) left lower-mid, a small fluffy long-haired brown dog looking toward camera; 4) top right, the heroine as an office worker typing on a laptop indoors at night in warm room light; 5) right middle, a romantic silhouette scene of a woman and man standing by a riverside railing at sunset; 6) right lower-middle, a ferret curled in a soft blanket looking outward; 7) lower right, a graduate in cap and gown holding a diploma; 8) lower center-left, the heroine sitting on a shoreline from behind beside the dog and the ferret; 9) a stack of 2 small tilted snapshot photos on the right side, one showing a concert or live-house scene from behind and one showing the heroine riding a bicycle by the water. In the lower left background, include a large red torii gate standing in the sea near a city skyline, reminiscent of Miyajima, under a vivid orange-pink twilight sky with reflective water. Add soft cherry blossoms framing the lower right edge. The overall mood should be emotional, inspirational, bittersweet, and life-affirming, with rich amber, rose, and violet tones, cinematic depth, poster-grade compositing, soft bloom, and polished film-poster typography. Prominently place the large Japanese title 私という奇跡 across the center-bottom in bold white brush-calligraphy, with the English subtitle The Miracle of Me below it in elegant serif type. Add multiple lines of small white Japanese catchphrase text integrated around the collage, including reflective quotes near the upper left, upper right, left middle, and bottom area. Include a centered Japanese tagline below the title, small production credits near the bottom center, and the year plus ROADSHOW at the bottom right. Make it look like a premium 2024 Japanese drama film poster about one woman's life journey through school, work, love, pets, music, and graduation.
